200# return «

Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: A25


Other locations the gear can be found
Trade Fair
Furious Heart

Triggers: Duration of the battle

When an enemy is resurrected, they are stunned for 3 sec.
When an ally dies, the owner of the artifact resurrects them with 25% health and increases their damage by 50% for 3 sec. The owner of the artifact can only resurrect each ally once.
Also, when you resurrect a unit, the artifact owner's damage is increased by 2% until the end of the battle.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌗

First trigger: Duration of the battle
